text: Implement a real-time importance scoring mechanism for critical, recently modified memory entries. This will ensure that only the most relevant and updated data is retained, preventing the loss of crucial historical information and enhancing the overall efficiency of our system.
reason: This addresses the recent 'WinError 10054' by adding a dynamic scoring system to our importance weights. This proactive measure ensures our knowledge base remains robust and resilient against transient errors or malicious interference, aligning with the goal of maximizing our observational memory's effectiveness.
